---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve reap
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior (e.g., `reap https://some-site.com --optimize`).

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Scrape Engine: [e.g. wget, wget2]
